title: DexterMod
description: This is a project based on the TV series 'Dexter'
body:
In this mod I plan to add something 'Dexter' charaters as I can.
This mod adds more comical, funnier charaters, and also new biomes, items, achievements and structures (1 structure for now)
There is three mob as for now.

1. Brian Moser, AKA The Ice Truck Killer
2. Arthut Mitchell, AKA Trinity Killer
3. Travis Marshall

They all appear at night.

About structure, it's a church in travis biome. You need it to perform achievement 'Hello, Travis'.

The most important thing is blood. It drops from villagers. !IMPORTANT! Blood only drops when the villager can't see the sky. The easiest way to get it is to kill a villager in a dug tunnel
